description_long: This lamp features a circular, drum-shaped frame suspended by thin cables, designed for ceiling mounting. The frame is adorned with large, stylized cutouts resembling Monstera leaves, which create decorative shadows and visual interest. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal, finished in a matte or semi-gloss white or light gray color. The open design allows light to diffuse through the cutouts, casting intricate patterns onto surrounding surfaces. The lamp's minimalist suspension system keeps the focus on the decorative ring and its botanical motifs. Its overall aesthetic is modern with a touch of organic inspiration, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A circular pendant lamp with Monstera leaf cutouts on a white metal frame, suspended by thin cables. The open design casts decorative shadows and suits modern urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular frame with prominent Monstera leaf cutouts and the suspension cables above.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the depth of the frame and the shadow play from the leaf cutouts.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the Monstera leaf cutouts visible and the circular form emphasized.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, again showing the frame's depth and the arrangement of the leaf cutouts.
